relations.subject: Cream-breasted fruit dove
relations.evidence: It is found in multiple protected areas such as Northern Sierra Madre Natural Park, Bulusan Volcano Natural Park, Mount Banahaw, Aurora Memorial National Park and Kalbario–Patapat Natural Park but despite this legal protection, deforestation and hunting continue even within these areas

relations.subject: Cream-breasted fruit dove
relations.evidence: Its natural habitat is tropical moist lowland to montane forests of up to 1,300 masl
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: Cream-breasted fruit dove
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss and trapping for the pet trade
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Cream-breasted fruit dove
relations.evidence: The IUCN has classified this species as near-threatened with the population on the declinedue to deforestation from land conversion, Illegal logging and slash-and-burn farming
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

relations.subject: Cream-breasted fruit dove
relations.evidence: This species also experiences hunting pressure for both meat and the pet trade
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。
